data.title: Modular Design
data.description: Adobe uses a modular architecture to ensure scalability and easy maintenance.
data.technical_spec: Microservices architecture built on containers and orchestrated via Kubernetes.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Uses AWS and Azure for hosting and infrastructure requirements with a focus on high availability.
data.technical_spec: Multi-cloud strategy utilizing AWS EC2, Azure VMs, and related services.

data.title: CI/CD Pipelines
data.description: Continuous integration and deployment practices to streamline software updates.
data.technical_spec: Implemented via Jenkins, Git, and Docker containers for automated testing and deployment.

data.title: Global CDN
data.description: Ensuring fast content delivery and improved user experience worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Akamai CDN integration for global content delivery optimization.

data.title: API-first Approach
data.description: Provides robust APIs for third-party integration, enhancing extensibility.
data.technical_spec: RESTful APIs supporting JSON and XML, secured through OAuth 2.0.
